description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Tests that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should run tests in a concurrency group that cancels in-progress runs. It should have two jobs: lint and build. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.12, and runs pre-commit. The build job depends on lint, runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python 3.12 and 3.13, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs tests with Pytest, and uploads coverage to Codecov.
